reviews.review_title: This is exactly what I was looking for
reviews.review_description:
For me, the biggest advantage of VR is to be able to visit "impossible places". Things like the game ico: immense landscapes that are misterious but not threatening.

This little gem is exactly that.

There's not much to do other than trasverse the surreal landscape (many ways to go about it) and marvel at the sublime vistas. 

I wanted to buy the full version but the process did not work out, something might be broken.

To the developer: thank you very much. This is something special

developer_response.body:
Thank you for downloading this application.

We are planning to add more content updates to this trial version as well as the full version.
We can't promise a timeframe, but please stay tuned.

As for the issue of purchasing the full version, we do not have that information here.
If you don't mind, we would appreciate it if you could provide us with more details and any other information you may have noticed.

----- 

ダウンロードいただき、ありがとうございます。

本編だけではなく、このトライアルバージョンにも、今後、
コンテンツアップデートを計画中です。時期はお約束できませんが、
ご期待ください。

フルバ―ション購入の問題に関しては、こちらには情報がありません。
もし差し支えなければ、詳しい状況や気が付いた点など教えていただければ幸いです。

reviews.review_description: I really love the vertigo sensation,  the feeling that you're outer space and exploring... please add more levels and enhance graphics!! Really enjoyable experience.  Cheers!
